MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-22-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MARY RATTLEY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT ASKED MS. Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by .
Attorney Mercedes A. Gavin appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tiana Woodridge is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Bigger representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne.

The trial date of MAR-05-2012 is vacated.
